backend/main.mo: Root Motoko actor that composes the application by including the MixinStorage blob-storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (mob types, mob rendering, player survival stats) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities entry with OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the 'Arcade Hub — Play Classic Games' title, Google Fonts preconnect hints, and a root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining 15 game routes (Snake, TicTacToe, Minecraft, etc.) under a shared Layout root route and exporting the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout with a sticky retro arcade header containing desktop and mobile-responsive nav links for all 15 games, a main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Reusable leaderboard component that reads top scores from localStorage, displays up to 5 ranked entries with neon accent styling, and supports both higher-is-better and lower-is-better modes.
Score submission form that accepts a nickname (up to 10 characters), persists the entry to localStorage via useLocalLeaderboard, and shows a confirmation state after saving.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1LolGame.ts: Implements a 1v1 platformer shooting game hook with player/AI characters, projectiles, wall placement, collision resolution, and game state management using refs for performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmongUsGame.ts: Implements an Among Us-inspired mini-game hook where the player completes tasks while avoiding an impostor, managing movement, task interaction, and win/lose conditions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFnafGame.ts: Implements a Five Nights at Freddy's-style survival game hook with animatronic movement along camera paths, door/power management, and night timer logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Provides a local leaderboard hook that persists and retrieves top-10 scores per game in localStorage, supporting both ascending and descending sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassic3D: Implements a 3D Minecraft-style game hook using Three.js with block types, procedural terrain generation, mobs, arrows, inventory, and crafting recipes.
frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts: Defines types, level data, and game state for a multi-level 2D platformer (OVO-style) with player physics including jumping, sliding, wall-jumping, and hazard detection. Contains three level definitions with platforms, gaps, hazards, and exits.
frontend/src/hooks/usePokemonGame.ts: Implements a turn-based Pokémon-style battle game hook with a roster of six typed Pokémon, move/damage calculations, and battle phase management. Provides state and callbacks for selecting Pokémon, executing moves, and tracking battle logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module reserved for future backend query hooks, noting that leaderboard data is currently handled via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetroBowlGame.ts: Implements a retro American football game hook with play selection (run/short-pass/long-pass), aiming, ball physics, and defender AI across a drive-based scoring system. Manages game state via a ref for frame-level updates and exposes controls for play selection, aiming, and throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerLeague: Implements a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game hook with physics for a player car, AI car, and ball including boost mechanics, collision, and goal detection over a timed match. Uses refs for high-frequency physics state and React state for UI score/timer updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlopeGame.ts: Implements a Slope-style endless runner game hook where a ball rolls down a lane, avoiding procedurally generated box and gap obstacles while accelerating over time. Manages steering input, collision detection, lane boundary checks, and obstacle recycling.
frontend/src/hooks/useStickmanArchersGam: React hook managing a stickman archers game with single/two-player modes, handling game state, arrow physics with gravity, AI shooting logic, aim adjustment, and collision detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSuperMarioGame.ts: React hook managing a Super Mario-style platformer game state including player physics, a multi-platform level layout with enemies and coins, and keyboard input handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a retro arcade dark theme with neon color tokens, Tailwind base/components/utilities, and custom neon button and arcade control styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AmongUsGame.tsx: Among Us-inspired game page that renders a canvas-based game with rooms, task stations, an impostor, and a player character, using the useAmongUsGame hook for state and including score submission and leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/FnafGame.tsx: Five Nights at Freddy's-inspired game page rendering an office/camera surveillance canvas game with door controls, power management, and animatronic tracking, using the useFnafGame hook with score submission and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/FootballBrosGame.tsx: Football Bros game page component (content truncated, likely a canvas-based football game with rendering and game hook integration similar to other game pages).
frontend/src/pages/GameLobby.tsx: Renders the main game lobby page displaying a grid of available games (Snake, Tic-Tac-Toe, Memory Match, etc.) with styled cards and navigation links, alongside a Leaderboard component.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements the Memory Match card-flipping game with move tracking, match detection, restart functionality, score submission, and a leaderboard sidebar.
Renders a 3D voxel-based Minecraft-style game using React Three Fiber with instanced block meshes, player controls, mobs, arrows, crafting, and a hotbar HUD.
frontend/src/pages/OneLolGame.tsx: Implements a 1v1 shooting/platformer game rendered on an HTML canvas with player vs. AI combat, HP bars, wall placement, score submission, and a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx: Renders the OvO speed-run platformer game on a canvas, polling game state for a timer and level HUD, with start/restart controls, score submission, and a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonGame.tsx: Renders a turn-based Pokémon battle game page with roster selection, battle arena with HP bars, battle log, and post-game score submission and leaderboard display, powered by the usePokemonGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/RetroBowlGame.tsx: Implements a retro American football game page using an HTML canvas for rendering the field, players, ball, and defenders, with play selection UI and score submission/leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerLeagueGam: Renders a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game using React Three Fiber, with a full 3D scene including cars, ball, field, goals, and lighting, plus a HUD overlay and score submission/leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/SlopeGame.tsx: Implements a 3D endless runner slope game using React Three Fiber, where a ball rolls down a lane avoiding obstacles, with keyboard controls, score tracking, and score submission/leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Classic Snake game rendered on an HTML canvas with neon arcade styling, handling movement, collision, food, scoring, and post-game score submission and leaderboard display.
frontend/src/pages/StickmanArchersGame.t: React page component for a Stickman Archers game that renders a canvas-based two-player archery game with neon night-sky visuals, stickman drawing helpers, arrow/particle effects, and game mode selection UI.
frontend/src/pages/SuperMarioGame.tsx: React page component for a Super Mario-style platformer that renders game state (player, enemies, coins, platforms, goal flag) onto a canvas with a HUD, score submission, and leaderboard integration.
frontend/src/pages/TicTacToeGame.tsx: React page component for a two-player local Tic-Tac-Toe game with win/draw detection, winning-line highlighting, player turn indicators, and a restart button using neon arcade styling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark arcade theme with neon accent colors (green, pink, cyan, yellow), pixel and sans font families, custom neon box shadows, and animation keyframes using oklch color values.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 23) describing the multi-game arcade platform's architecture, existing features, and known issues, covering games like Snake, Minecraft Classic 3D, Rocket Soccer League, and others built with React, Tailwind, and React Three Fiber.
